title: Redential vault anchor record v0 (discussion)
description: Server-side anchor summary for RFC #13 evidence vault. NOT wired — reserved for schema ceremony. Default privacy profile: coarse activity buckets only; no gap exposure.

schema_version.description: Discussion pin only. Bump to anchor.v1 after ceremony.

chain_id.description: Stable lineage per credential identity. Forks on reset, never silent splice.

prev_anchor_hash.description: SHA-256 of canonical prior anchor JSON. Null on genesis.

head_hash.description: SHA-256 of local vault head at submit.

receipt_count_since_prev.description: Receipts in segment since previous anchor.

max_finished_at_claimed.description: Max finished_at across segment receipts (client-claimed). Within-submit: future bound only (claim ≤ received_at_server + ε). Vs prior anchor: segment must not predate prior received_at_server by more than ε (default 7 days).

activity_period.description: Coarse activity bucket derived from received_at_server. DEFAULT profile — no finer granularity.

first_anchor_at.description: Genesis anchor time for this chain_id. Flags anchor-timing arbitrage.

reset_reason.description: Null on normal append. Set on fork — revoke forward, not delete.

privacy_profile.description: Only profile at launch: coarse buckets, gap non-exposure. No per-session server timestamps.
